Update to Country-Specific Guidelines and Instructions, Form 3597
We updated the sanctions / warning messages for the specified countries in the Country-Specific Guidelines and Instructions, Form 3597. These changes will also be made in the Wires application. We also updated the form to include recent changes to payment instructions in the Wires application where applicable.
